mapper.sql: CASE WHEN COALESCE(d.category, '') LIKE '%中药%' OR COALESCE(d.category, '') LIKE '%中成药%' OR COALESCE(d.approval_no, '') LIKE '国药准字Z%' THEN '中药' ELSE '西/成药' END
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.id AS drug_id, d.drug_code, d.name AS drug_name, d.purchase_price AS old_purchase_price, d.purchase_price AS new_purchase_price, d.sell_price AS old_sell_price, d.sell_price AS new_sell_price, d.specification, d.dosage_form, d.manufacturer, AS prescription_category, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted FROM clinic_drug d WHERE ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_drug d WHERE

SELECT d.id, d.id AS drug_id, d.drug_code, d.name AS drug_name, d.purchase_price AS new_purchase_price, d.sell_price AS new_sell_price, d.specification, d.dosage_form, d.manufacturer, AS prescription_category, COUNT(p.id) AS adjustment_count, MAX(p.created_at) AS created_at, MAX(p.updated_at) AS updated_at, 0 AS deleted FROM clinic_price_adjustment p INNER JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND GROUP BY d.id, d.drug_code, d.name, d.purchase_price, d.sell_price, d.specification, d.dosage_form, d.manufacturer, d.category, d.approval_no ORDER BY MAX(p.created_at) DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.drug_id) FROM clinic_price_adjustment p INNER JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND

SELECT d.id, d.id AS drug_id, d.drug_code, d.name AS drug_name, d.purchase_price AS old_purchase_price, d.purchase_price AS new_purchase_price, d.sell_price AS old_sell_price, d.sell_price AS new_sell_price, d.specification, d.dosage_form, d.manufacturer, AS prescription_category, i.id AS inventory_id, i.batch_no, COALESCE(i.quantity, 0) AS quantity, COALESCE(i.unit, d.unit) AS unit, i.purchase_amount, i.retail_amount, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted FROM clinic_drug d LEFT JOIN clinic_inventory i ON i.drug_id = d.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE d.id = #{drugId} AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.drug_id, p.drug_code, p.drug_name, p.old_purchase_price, p.new_purchase_price, p.old_sell_price, p.new_sell_price, p.operator, p.reason, d.specification, d.dosage_form, d.manufacturer, AS prescription_category, inventory.inventory_id, inventory.batch_no, COALESCE(inventory.quantity, 0) AS quantity, COALESCE(inventory.unit, d.unit) AS unit, inventory.purchase_amount, inventory.retail_amount, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted FROM clinic_price_adjustment p INNER JOIN clinic_drug d ON d.id = p.drug_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT drug_id, MAX(id) AS inventory_id, MAX(batch_no) AS batch_no, SUM(COALESCE(quantity, 0)) AS quantity, MAX(unit) AS unit, SUM(COALESCE(purchase_amount, 0)) AS purchase_amount, SUM(COALESCE(retail_amount, 0)) AS retail_amount FROM clinic_inventory WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY drug_id ) inventory ON inventory.drug_id = d.id WHERE p.drug_id = #{drugId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_price_adjustment WHERE deleted = 0
AND ( drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR operator LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT id, drug_id, drug_code, drug_name, old_purchase_price, new_purchase_price, old_sell_price, new_sell_price, operator, reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_price_adjustment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_price_adjustment
drug_id = #{drugId}, drug_code = #{drugCode}, drug_name = #{drugName}, old_purchase_price = #{oldPurchasePrice}, new_purchase_price = #{newPurchasePrice}, old_sell_price = #{oldSellPrice}, new_sell_price = #{newSellPrice}, operator = #{operator}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE clinic_drug SET purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, sell_price = #{sellPrice}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{drugId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE clinic_inventory SET purchase_amount = COALESCE(quantity, 0) * #{purchasePrice}, retail_amount = COALESCE(quantity, 0) * #{sellPrice}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE drug_id = #{drugId} AND deleted = 0
